scope: zero-training frozen-checkpoint attribution of whether middle-noise production graphs lose clean coordination, whether an oracle clean-topology carrier explains held-out coordinate residual, and whether final noisy edge states linearly predict that topology

topology.definition: for every directed periodic-image edge, a smooth clean first-shell probability is a logistic transition around 1.25 times the target site's exact clean nearest-neighbour distance, multiplied by the production cosine cutoff envelope

probe.features: final persistent edge state, symmetric sum and absolute difference of a fixed 16-channel cosine projection of final source/target node states, current production radial basis, current soft-shell probability and periodic-self-image indicator

oracle_carrier.features: current periodic direction times current radial basis, aggregated with clean, noisy or probe-predicted soft coordination and graphwise translation-mean removal
oracle_carrier.normalization: per-target square root of summed squared coordination mass

decision_rule.topology_not_disrupted: if clean/noisy topology disagreement fails either frozen disruption criterion, do not add a topology mechanism
decision_rule.oracle_fails: if the clean-topology oracle fails, reject the topology hypothesis and turn to objective or optimization diagnosis
decision_rule.oracle_passes_probe_fails: if the oracle helps but the probe is not predictive, propose a separately frozen topology encoder or staged generator, not direct production integration
decision_rule.oracle_and_probe_pass: only if topology is disrupted, clean mass is covered, the oracle helps, the probe predicts and the probe-weighted carrier retains at least half the oracle gain, authorize a separate no-training production qualification
decision_rule.low_noise_only: improvement restricted to t=0.2 does not authorize added complexity
decision_rule.boundary: No threshold, topology definition, panel, feature, ridge, time, seed or checkpoint may change after viewing results. This audit performs zero optimizer steps, adds no production branch, does not rewrite H1a, and cannot authorize extra training, H1b-H6, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
